name_cn:
Genuine quality
❤️【Lady Dior My ABC】Purple Lambskin
/ Five-compartment lambskin /
This handbag embodies Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty.
Crafted from fine lambskin leather with a signature herringbone stitch for quilting details, the elegant and classic design is timeless.
Adorned with enamel in matching tones, lined with suede, and equipped with a chain shoulder strap, internal zip pocket.
Can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Size: 24 x 20 x 11 cm
